query: We removed the legacy CSV export feature last sprint. What should we do with its documentation?
expected_behavior: Recommends moving the documentation to an archive/ directory, not deleting it
Adds a 'superseded' notice at the top of the archived doc with the date and reason for removal
Updates the relevant index files (README.md, llms.txt) to remove the reference to the feature
Does not leave the documentation in the main docs/ directory where it will confuse future readers
Does not silently delete the docs — archival preserves knowledge, deletion loses it
